subject: Update xtesting READMEs
commit_message:
Update xtesting READMEs

They can be used to run the xtesting dockers on any ONAP deployment
Note a section in the official doc shall also be created

Issue-ID: TEST-274

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: If1d98e51c1dd476f5b1da81e51e4b4d99f513aa5
Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>

we could optimize a little bit the trigger. Here we rebuild all the dockers on any change in this repo...it is just a docker build not an ONAP deployment...so it takes few minutes..but you are right we could optimize a little bit and exclude the triggering on doc change..Today it was useful anyway..because of the temporary problem on git.onap.org, it regenerated the dockers that were not produced as expected through the daily mechanism
